prompt: A highly stylized 3D cartoon character of a young professional footballer, standing in a powerful confident pose with arms folded and one foot slightly forward. He is wearing a modern blue and red gradient soccer jersey with subtle patterns, matching athletic shorts, long fitted socks, and premium cleats. The character has smooth warm brown skin, a slightly oversized head with Pixar-style proportions, large expressive eyes, defined eyebrows, and short textured curly hair with golden highlights. Facial expression is calm, confident, with a slight smirk. Body posture shows attitude and dominance, slightly leaning to one side. Ultra-detailed Pixar-quality 3D rendering, octane render, soft cinematic studio lighting with rim light glow, realistic shadows, glossy fabric textures, and high contrast reflections. Background is a clean solid vibrant red with subtle gradient and soft vignette. Character is perfectly centered, full-body visible, shallow depth of field, ultra HD 8K resolution, professional character design, animated movie style.
